zh.lifeSummary: 當Avelina de Hesdin於1075年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯維爾-斯丁時，她的父親Ernulf de Hesdin37歲，母親Ammeline de Baladon37歲。她於1105年之前與Alan Dapifer FitzFlaad在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1126年11月5日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴享年51歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Avelina de Hesdin于1075年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯維爾-斯丁时，她的父亲Ernulf de Hesdin37岁，母亲Ammeline de Baladon37岁。她于1105年之前与Alan Dapifer FitzFlaad在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1126年11月5日在英国英格兰史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴享年51岁，埋葬在苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hesdin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Longford and Leitrim): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEislin, a shortened form of the older Ó hEisleanáin ‘descendant of Eisleanán’, a byname probably derived from éislinn ‘unsafe, weak’.

English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Alselin, from ancient Germanic Anselin, with assimilatory change of n to the following -l-. This is a French form of ancient Germanic Ans(e)helm, composed of the elements ans- ‘(pagan) god’ and helm- ‘helmet’; compare Anselm .
English: topographic name for a dweller ‘(by the) hazel copse’, from Old English hæsling, or a habitational name from any of various minor places called with this word.

variants.name: Henslin
meanings: Irish: possibly a variant of   Heslin  .
South German: from a pet form of   Hensel   (see   Hans  ).

variants.name: Anselm
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Klaus, Heinz.

English and German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Anshelm, composed of the elements ans- ‘god’ + helm ‘protection, helmet’. The personal name was taken to France and England by St. Anselm (c. 1033–1109), known as the Father of Scholasticism. He was born in Aosta, Italy, joined the Benedictine order at Bec in Normandy, France, and in 1093 became archbishop of Canterbury, England.

nameMeanings.name: Avelina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Norman name   Evelyn .

en.lifeSummary: When Avelina de Hesdin was born in 1075, in Vieil-Hesdin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Ernulf de Hesdin, was 37 and her mother, Ammeline de Baladon, was 37. She married Alan Dapifer FitzFlaad before 1105, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 5 November 1126, in Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51, and was buried in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Avelina de Hesdin est née en 1075, à Vieil-Hesdin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Ernulf de Hesdin, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Ammeline de Baladon, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Alan Dapifer FitzFlaad avant 1105, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 5 novembre 1126, à Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Avelina de Hesdin 1075 in Vieil-Hesdin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ernulf de Hesdin 37 und ihre Mutter Ammeline de Baladon 37. Sie hat vor 1105 in England Alan Dapifer FitzFlaad geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 5. November 1126 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Avelina de Hesdin è nata il nel 1075 nel Vieil-Hesdin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Ernulf de Hesdin, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Ammeline de Baladon, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Alan Dapifer FitzFlaad prima del 1105, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 5 novembre 1126, nel Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Avelina de Hesdinが1075年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスヴィエイル-ヘスディンで生まれた時，父Ernulf de Hesdinは37歳，母Ammeline de Baladonは37歳であった。1105年以前にイギリスでAlan Dapifer FitzFlaadと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1126年11月5日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアカストレ-プウルバーバトチで51歳で死去し，スコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Avelina de Hesdin(이)가 1075년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 비이-헤즈딘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ernulf de Hesdin(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ammeline de Baladon(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1105년 이전 영국에서 Alan Dapifer FitzFlaad(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1126년 11월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 카스틀레-풀버바트치에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리에 묻혔다.

mn.Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England: Castle-Pulverbatch, Salopesberia, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Avelina de Hesdin nasceu em 1075, em Vieil-Hesdin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Ernulf de Hesdin, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Ammeline de Baladon, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Alan Dapifer FitzFlaad antes 1105, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 5 de novembro de 1126, em Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Avelina de Hesdin родилась в 1075 г. в местности виил-хесдин, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Ernulf de Hesdin было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Ammeline de Baladon, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alan Dapifer FitzFlaad перед 1105 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 5 ноября 1126 г. в местности кастле-пулвирбач, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Avelina de Hesdin nació en 1075, en Vieil-Hesdin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Ernulf de Hesdin, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Ammeline de Baladon, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Alan Dapifer FitzFlaad antes de 1105, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 5 de noviembre de 1126, en Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.
